summary: CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal satisfied (worker_run_log is SUPPORTING, not CANONICAL/ERROR; cantonal cardinality governs CANONICAL+ERROR only; lcs already has lcs_canonical+lcs_errors), Registry-First (CTB pre-registration at Section 1 before CREATE TABLE), Sovereign ID (no minting, worker execution logging only), No sideways calls (fn_worker_tick dispatches to lcs.fn_promote_emission_batch and lcs.fn_finalize_dispatch_batch — both within lcs schema). ENVELOPE: PASS — all 4 fields match (change_type=feature, architectural_flag=false, doctrine_version=2.8.0). SCOPE: PASS — 2 modified paths within migrations/ and tests/. No protected assets touched. EXECUTION: PASS — all 6 acceptance criteria met. worker_run_log created as SUPPORTING with CTB registration, append-only with completion carve-out (identity columns immutable via guard trigger, DELETE blocked, completion columns mutable). fn_worker_tick(text, int) dispatches to batch functions by run_type: PROMOTE_EMISSIONS→fn_promote_emission_batch, FINALIZE_DISPATCH→fn_finalize_dispatch_batch (stub returning 0). Returns strict JSON with 6 required keys (run_id, run_type, attempted, success, errors, status). No RAISE-after-DML — inner BEGIN...EXCEPTION subtransaction catches batch failures, run log INSERT survives in outer transaction, status set to FAIL and returned in JSON. Invalid run_type validated before any DML (no orphan STARTED rows). lcs_worker role with EXECUTE-only on fn_worker_tick, REVOKE ALL on 7 LCS tables. Check constraints enforce run_type (2 values) and status (4 values). 13 enforcement tests across 4 categories: worker_run_log structure (5), fn_worker_tick dispatch/JSON (4), run log recording (2), permissions (2). OBSERVATIONS: (1) No RAISE-after-DML confirmed — correct subtransaction design. (2) Attempted count approximate for PROMOTE_EMISSIONS (best-effort metric). (3) FINALIZE stub returns 0, status=SUCCESS — correct for 'nothing to do'. (4) Permission test coverage verifies role and EXECUTE but not REVOKE (non-blocking).
